itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.radiant: Small pieces of bluish glowing material. What could they be used for?
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.dire_cr: Small pieces of reddish glowing material. What could they be used for?
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.radiant: Mineral known for its unpredictable structure. It is a bluish, glowing substance blessed with benevolent magic.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.dire_cr: Mineral known for its unpredictable evil structure. It is a reddish, glowing substance blessed with unkind magic.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.crystal: Magic dust with a little glow around it.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.mithril: Four times stronger than iron, yet much lighter. It has high malleability but it requires very high temperatures to be worked.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.blight_: An unnerving stone unearthed beneath the Fields of Endless Carnage.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.gloves_: A pair of magical gloves that seems to render weapons weightless.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.blades_: The damage of these small, concealable blades should not be underestimated.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.mithril: A hammer forged of pure mithril.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.broadsw: The classic weapon of choice for knights, this blade is sturdy and reliable for slaying enemies.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.claymor: A sword that can cut through armor, it's a commonly chosen first weapon for budding swordsmen.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.javelin: A rather typical spear that can sometimes pierce through an enemy's armor when used to attack.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.blade_o: A long blade imbued with time magic.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.ogre_ax: You grow stronger just by holding it.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.staff_o: A staff of magical powers passed down from the eldest mages.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.belt_of: A valued accessory for improving vitality.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.band_of: A tensile fabric often used for its light weight and ease of movement.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.robe_of: This robe corrupts the soul of the user, but provides wisdom in return.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.sacred_: An ancient weapon that often turns the tides of war.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.talisma: A necklace that allows you to anticipate enemy attacks.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.eagleso: Capturing the majestic call of an eagle, this mystical horn brings limitless dexterity to those who hear it.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.demon_e: One of the oldest weapons forged by the Demon-Smith Abzidian, it killed its maker when he tested its edge.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.monkey_: A powerful staff used by a master warrior.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.crystal: A blade forged from rare crystals, it seeks weak points in enemy armor.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.daedalu: A weapon of incredible power that is difficult for even the strongest of warriors to control.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.butterf: Only the mightiest and most experienced of warriors can wield the Butterfly but it provides incredible dexterity in combat.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.sange: Sange is an unusually accurate weapon, seeking weak points automatically.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.yasha: Yasha is regarded as the swiftest weapon ever created.
itemTooltip.defense-of-the-craft.kaya: The staff of a renowned sorceress, lost for countless millennia.
death.attack.defense-of-the-craft.magica: %1$s died from Defense Of The Craft magic!
